fontStack: none (pre-redesign: no next/font, no Google Fonts link)
motion: none — no motion library in package.json
spacing: raw Tailwind utility scale, no named tokens
framework: Next.js 16 (app router), Tailwind v4 (CSS-first, @tailwindcss/postcss, no tailwind.config file)
notes: No design.md existed before this run. No marketing pages — app/page.tsx redirects to /researchers. Whole app was Hebrew/RTL (html lang=he dir=rtl).
